examples: The chest was made for a bride's trousseau.
And I think I'll buy your trousseau for you, too.
The ex- wife's trousseau all of me handed over to elder sister son.
When she married him in 1940 her presents included a Bentley, a hill-station house and a trousseau that was left for collection at the Ritz in Paris.
There was also the fact that we already had first-class tickets (by this time we had racked up a gazillion miles), a suite at L'Hotel and, on my end, a particularly swell trousseau.
